title: Mercury Garden
description: Mercury Garden explores the intersection between organic alchemy and texture. Built with thick layers of oil paint blended with volcanic sand and beeswax, the surface is carved and scraped to reveal vibrant underlayers of mineral green and sulfur yellow.

title: Blue Room Memory
description: A profound exploration of interior architectures and shadowplay, Blue Room Memory uses raw pigments bound in egg tempera. The diptych formats a narrative pull between figures, suspended in a dense, velvety indigo background.

title: Ritual for Afternoon
description: Balancing classical composition with raw graffiti elements, Ritual for Afternoon is a high-contrast piece in shades of violet and deep charcoal. The canvas captures a moment of weightless release within an ornate architectural dome.

title: Chroma Alchemy
medium: Oil and gold leaf on canvas
description: Chroma Alchemy is an investigation into light reflection and chemical textures. Using layered oil pigments alongside gold leaf overlays, it mimics geological formations and oxidized metal sheets under harsh direct light.

title: Velvet Shadows
description: An expressive, mood-centric portrait study focusing on texture, shadow, and emotional projection. The painting is characterized by heavy palette-knife application, raw scraper marks, and random splatters that disrupt the facial contours.

title: Ethereal Forest Study
description: A surrealist exploration of forest density and atmospheric scattering at dusk. Bright sun rays slice through hyper-detailed, twisted boughs, creating high-contrast patches of lime green and deep mystical purple.

title: Terra Impasto
description: Inspired by Mediterranean earth and plaster walls, Terra Impasto layers clay-tinted oil pigments over a raw textured plaster base, creating three-dimensional valleys and ridges that play with ambient shadows.

title: Organic Silence
description: A quiet, tactile geometric study using highly diluted oil washes mixed with marble dust on gesso. The work emphasizes the negative spaces between flowing ribbons of pink and sage green, capturing a moment of absolute stillness.

title: Neon Monolith
description: Explores the tension between synthetic and organic light layers. Bright neon underwash shines through thick scraper strokes of carbon black oil, creating an active glow around structural geometry.

title: Crimson Portrait Study
description: Part of a series of red gestural drawings. Using oil bars and wet blending techniques, the paint captures facial kinetics under dim lighting, focusing on raw pigment density.

title: Twilight Canopies
description: An exercise in atmospheric perspective, Twilight Canopies uses layered glaze washes to form deep forest layers under a dark violet dusk sky, highlighted with bright ochre spots.

title: Rust & Gesso Study
description: Iron oxides mixed directly into white acrylic gesso. Over months, oxidation produces red-brown patterns across the surface, reflecting organic aging and corrosion.

title: Echoes in Sage
description: Fluid sage green washes interact with textured gesso borders. The canvas uses negative space to represent silence and memory.

title: Golden Eclipse
description: A circular abstract form built using gold powder mixed with beeswax. The painting reflects light differently depending on the viewing angle, creating an active visual shift.

title: Indigo Threshold
description: A dark portal study investigating color depth. Over thirty layers of indigo pigment are brushed over raw linen, creating a rich space that pulls the viewer in.

title: Violet Scribe
description: Fast gestural strokes of violet acrylic over a white canvas base. The brush marks mimic ancient calligraphy and hand-written signs.

title: Mineral Ridges
description: Pumice stone dust mixed into oil paint creates a textured surface mimicking rock faces and mineral deposits found in mountain ranges.

title: Amber Shadows
medium: Oil and carbon black on canvas
description: A portrait-like study of shadows cast through textured glass. Warm amber tones blend with carbon black to represent passing time.

title: Radiant Foliage
description: A study of light filtering through wet leaves. Vibrant greens and deep purples create a dense, organic pattern representing forest growth.

title: Terracotta Relic
description: Raw clay pigments brushed over wet plaster. The surface cracks naturally as it dries, giving the work the look of an excavated relic.

title: Silent Horizon
description: A minimal landscape study dividing the frame into sky and ground washes, focusing on soft color gradients and atmospheric depth.

title: Alchemical Sun
description: An abstract study of solar flares. Layered cadmium yellow and metallic gold powders create a textured, radiating surface.

title: Cobalt Dream
description: A dreamlike study in cobalt blue and charcoal. The painting explores fluid space and light scattering through suspension.

title: Charcoal Vault
medium: Charcoal and white gesso on linen
description: Thick charcoal blocks rubbed over a highly textured gesso panel, creating high-contrast structural drawings resembling dark vaults.
